title: Start
body:
Френсис Чэн: Hm? You're home. ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_正坐轉頭) >>
Френсис Чэн: Why'd you turn off the lights? It's bad for your eyes, you know.
Френсис Чэн: Were you waiting for me? ; <<set(a,1)>>
<< #Simple (3)>>
-> Maybe? ; << PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_正坐點頭) >>
    Френсис Чэн: Haha, what do you mean "maybe"? ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_側站摸臉_包包) >>
    Френсис Чэн: And why are you in the dark...
    Френсис Чэн: Did you accidentally fall asleep?
    Френсис Чэн: You're like an old man! ; << PlayUntil (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_側站摸臉倒播_包包) >>
-> Yeah, why else? ; << Set ($WhatADick, $WhatADick + 1) >> ; << Set ($RS_ChengFang, $RS_ChengFang - 1) >>
    Френсис Чэн: Oh... is that so?
    Френсис Чэн: ...
-> ...
<< #EndSimple >>
Френсис Чэн: Looks like you're already dressed to go.
Френсис Чэн: Hm, you can change into your work uniform when we get to the farm. ; <<set(a,1)>>
<< Set ($StateEnd, 0) >>
<< #End >>

title: 洗澡敲門
body:
<< Set ($PlayerMove, false) >>
<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_敲門) >>
<< #IsGoTo ($CountKnockHowManyTime = 4, @是要敲幾次) >>
Френсис Чэн: ...
<< #IsGoTo ($CountKnockHowManyTime < 0, @敲很多次所以不理你了) >>
Френсис Чэн: Jason?
Френсис Чэн: Was that you? What is it?
<< @敲很多次所以不理你了 >>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> I found your hard drive.($FoundFangsHardDrive)
    << Set ($FoundFangsHardDrive, 1) >>
    << #IsGoTo ($ChooseToBeIdiot = -2, @說過要拿沐浴乳了) >>
    Френсис Чэн: Whaaat?
    <<#Simple(5)>>
    -> I said, I found your hard drive.
        Френсис Чэн: Sorry, you sound really muffled!
        Френсис Чэн: You want... your shampoo?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> I FOUND YOUR HARD DRIVE!
            Френсис Чэн: Hahahaha!
            Френсис Чэн: I was way off!
            Френсис Чэн: Sorry. That just tickled my funny bone.
            Френсис Чэн: Gotcha! I told you I couldn't hear you properly!
            Френсис Чэн: Just hand it to me later.
            Френсис Чэн: Thanks! ; << Set ($FoundFangsHardDrive, -2) >>
        -> Yeah, can you hand it to me?($ChooseToBeIdiot)
            <<Set($ChooseToBeIdiot, -2)>> 
            Френсис Чэн: Now?
            Френсис Чэн: It's gonna be cold!
            Френсис Чэн: Why do you need it anyways?
            <<#Simple(99999)>>
            -> For research purposes.
                Френсис Чэн: ...?
                Френсис Чэн: I'm gonna ignore you now...
                Френсис Чэн: Can't the jokes wait until I'm out of the shower?!
            -> Nah, I actually found your hard drive.
                Френсис Чэн: Nice.
                Френсис Чэн: Then why did you ask for the shampoo? Haha!
                Френсис Чэн: I'm glad you found it. Just hand it to me later.
                Френсис Чэн: Thanks! ; << Set ($FoundFangsHardDrive, -2) >>
            <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    -> Nothing.
        Френсис Чэн: Okay!
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Can we shower together?($LetsShowerTogether)
    << Set ($LetsShowerTogether, -2) >>
    << #IsElseTo ($PlayerKeepAngry = true, @沒生氣可以一起洗嗎) >>
    Френсис Чэн: What?
    Френсис Чэн: You… Whaaat? Hahaha!
    Френсис Чэн: What happened to grumpy Jason?
    Френсис Чэн: Did he just disappear?
    Френсис Чэн: ...When did you get so bold with your requests?
    Френсис Чэн: You're acting weird today...
    Френсис Чэн: Not now, Jason. I mean, look at the time.
    Френсис Чэн: I'm almost done, too... Pervert. ; << #GoTo (@洗澡敲門結束) >>
    << @沒生氣可以一起洗嗎 >>
    Френсис Чэн: ...?!
    Френсис Чэн: You… Whaaat? Hahaha!
    Френсис Чэн: What's gotten into you? You're normally too embarrassed by stuff like that to...
    Френсис Чэн: Ah, but not now. I mean, look at the time.
    Френсис Чэн: I'm almost done, too... Pervert.
-> You were on the PL8!($YouPlayByYourself)
    << Set ($YouPlayByYourself, -2) >>
    << #IsElseTo ($PlayerKeepAngry = true, @沒生氣發現偷打遊戲) >>
    Френсис Чэн: Guilty!
    Френсис Чэн: Sorry, I really wanted to play today!
    Френсис Чэн: Was that what you were mad about?
    Френсис Чэн: Sorry!
    Френсис Чэн: Our last save is still there!
    Френсис Чэн: We can continue from there this weekend. I promise! ; << #GoTo (@洗澡敲門結束) >>
    << @沒生氣發現偷打遊戲 >>
    Френсис Чэн: Hahaha, you got me!
    Френсис Чэн: Did I forget to shut it down?
    Френсис Чэн: Sorry, I really felt like playing today...
    Френсис Чэн: I had to find out what happens after that cliffhanger!
    <<#Simple(3)>>
    -> Come on!
        Френсис Чэн: Haha, I know, I know. Sorry.
        Френсис Чэн: It still has our last save file!
        Френсис Чэн: Let's find time to play together from there.
    -> What about me?
        Френсис Чэн: It still has our last save file!
        Френсис Чэн: Let's find time to play together from there.
    -> ...
    << #EndSimple >>
    Френсис Чэн: Now let me finish my shower.
-> Sorry, I couldn't find your hard drive.($AskTooSoonBefore)
    << #IsElseTo ($InvestigateTimesUp = true, @太早問了) >>
    Френсис Чэн: Oh... is that so.
    Френсис Чэн: Okay, let me look for it later!
    Френсис Чэн: Sorry for making you do—
    Френсис Чэн: Ah!
    Френсис Чэн: I remember now! It should be... <color=#E7D6A9>Under the living room table</color> !
    Френсис Чэн: I tipped my bag over this morning and a bunch of stuff fell out.
    Френсис Чэн: It might be near one of the table legs.
    Френсис Чэн: Can you check that area for me?
    Френсис Чэн: Pleeeease? Thank you!
    << Set ($AskTooSoonBefore, -2) >> ; << #GoTo (@洗澡敲門結束) >>
    << @太早問了 >>
    Френсис Чэн: Huh?
    Френсис Чэн: That was fast!
    Френсис Чэн: Did you even try?
    Френсис Чэн: C'mon. Do it for me.
    Френсис Чэн: I'm sure it's there, just look around. Pleeeeease?
    << Set ($AskTooSoonBefore, -1) >> ; << #GoTo (@洗澡敲門結束) >>
-> Nothing.($CountKnockHowManyTime)
<<#EndSimple >>
<< Set ($CountKnockHowManyTime, $CountKnockHowManyTime + 1) >>
<< @洗澡敲門結束 >>
<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_敲門返回) >> ; << Set ($PlayerMove, true) >> ; << #End >>
<< @是要敲幾次 >>
<< Set ($CountKnockHowManyTime, -99999) >>
Френсис Чэн: Do you have to knock the door every minute?
Френсис Чэн: C'mon, just let me take my shower!
Френсис Чэн: I'm ignoring you until I'm done here.
Френсис Чэн: Hmph!
<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_敲門返回) >> ; << Set ($PlayerMove, true) >> ; << #End >>
//這裡是對話底部，以下內容都是沒用的東西喔。

title: 程芳坐上桌子後
body: Френсис Чэн: So how are you doing? Ready for your new job? ; << PlayUntil (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_側轉靠桌) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> All ready. ; << PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_正坐點頭) >> Френсис Чэн: I'm glad you're so reliable, Jason. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_靠桌歪頭) >> Френсис Чэн: That's reassuring. -> Not sure? Френсис Чэн: Haha, you would say that. Френсис Чэн: Do you have to be so careful about everything? ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_靠桌歪頭) >> Френсис Чэн: Try being more positive! Френсис Чэн: It's okay. That's what I like about you anyways. <<#EndSimple>> Френсис Чэн: If there's anything on your mind, you can always tell me about it. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_靠桌歪頭倒播) >> Френсис Чэн: You can share any burden with me! ; << PlayUntil (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_靠桌撥髮) >> Френсис Чэн: Okay? Френсис Чэн: By the way, there's a new notice from the Management Committee. They're replacing the floor tiles in the entrance hall. ; << PlayUntil (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文) >> Френсис Чэн: They just need authorization from every resident. You've got the authorizer, right? Френсис Чэн: Can I get it from you later? ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文轉頭) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Sure. ; << PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_正坐點頭) >> Френсис Чэн: Thanks. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文轉頭倒播) >> -> The what? Френсис Чэн: Hm? Внутренний голос: Why did I ask that? Френсис Чэн: What what? ; << PlayUntil (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文歪頭) >> <<#Simple(4)>> -> What was the thing you needed from me? Френсис Чэн: The device for residents to authorize changes to this building. The one you held for safekeeping. Френсис Чэн: It's in a white box. Don't you remember? <<@什麼東西難過>> Френсис Чэн: Oh no, did you lose it? ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文驚訝) >> <<#Simple(4)>> -> No, it's good. I'll get it for you. Френсис Чэн: Good... Френсис Чэн: Don't scare me. I don't want to be lectured to again by the landlady. ; << Play(程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文驚訝倒播) >> Френсис Чэн: Thinking back, I don't remember you ever losing anything. Френсис Чэн: You wouldn't lose anything this important, right? -> I don't think I'll be able to find it right now. Внутренний голос: What? Френсис Чэн: Hmm... Then we're in trouble. ; << Play(程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文驚訝倒播) >> Френсис Чэн: I'll need to talk to our landlady. At least, not since I met you. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文抬頭) >> Френсис Чэн: Not to mention something as important as the apartment's chop. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文抬頭轉頭) >> Френсис Чэн: Well, it's okay! Let's just get ourselves a new one. Френсис Чэн: Don't worry, I'll take care of it. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文點頭) >> Внутренний голос: I didn't lose it. I can't be adding to her workload. <<#Simple(3)>> -> Hey, I remember where I put it. Френсис Чэн: Huh? Френсис Чэн: Really?! Great! Френсис Чэн: Phew, I'm so glad to hear that! Haha! ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文低頭) >> Френсис Чэн: That landlady can be a handful to deal with. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文低頭倒播) >> <<#GoTo(@不要跳過程芳說晚點要拿給她)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@跳過程芳說晚點要拿給她)>> <<@不要跳過程芳說晚點要拿給她>> -> ... <<#EndSimple >> -> Nah, it's nothing. Френсис Чэн: Nice. -> ... <<#EndSimple >> Френсис Чэн: Just remember to get it to me tonight. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文轉頭倒播) >> <<#EndSimple >> <<@跳過程芳說晚點要拿給她>> Френсис Чэн: Phew... Френсис Чэн: I also had to deal with all the bureaucracy. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文抬頭倒播) >> Внутренний голос: Why does she put herself out there like that? Someone else would've taken care of it. Френсис Чэн: I'm glad I kept at it, because it looks like we're finally getting some progress! <<#Simple(6)>> -> Hey, good job. It didn't look easy. Френсис Чэн: ... Френсис Чэн: Wait, are you really Jason? ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文轉頭) >> Френсис Чэн: Why aren't you nagging me about being a busybody? <<@士傑是不是要開唸囉>> Внутренний голос: I wanted to... Внутренний голос: It doesn't have to be you. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> You can always let someone else do it. Френсис Чэн: You know, if everyone thinks like that... Френсис Чэн: ... Hearing that from you makes me really happy! <<#Simple(3)>> -> Just remember to take care of yourself. Френсис Чэн: Hahaha, okay! ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文歪頭) >> Френсис Чэн: I will, thank you! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> I just want you to take more care of yourself. Френсис Чэн: Mm, sorry. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_藍裙_看文點頭) >> Френсис Чэн: Sorry for making you worry. <<#Simple(3)>> -> But still, you did great, Frances. Френсис Чэн: Really?! Френсис Чэн: Hahaha! title: 吹頭髮對話3
body:
<< Set ($PlayerMove, false) >> ; << Set ($CameraBlackLevel, 1) >> ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站低頭) >>

<< #IsElseTo ($LetsShowerTogether = -2, @要一起洗澡話題結束) >>

-> I wanted us to have a bit of fun!
    Френсис Чэн: Are you really Jason Dai?
    Френсис Чэн: I've never heard you say something like that, haha.
    Френсис Чэн: Have you been... drinking?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Yeah.
        Френсис Чэн: Figures... ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
        Френсис Чэн: Are you anxious about the interview?
        <<#Simple(4)>>
        -> No, it's nothing.
            Френсис Чэн: Is that so...
            Френсис Чэн: If you need to talk, you know where to find me.
            <<#GoTo(@要一起洗澡話題結束)>>
        -> A little.
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Френсис Чэн: Don't worry, I'll be there with you.
        Френсис Чэн: Take a deep breath. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
        <<#GoTo(@要一起洗澡話題結束)>>
    -> No.
        Френсис Чэн: Then why are you acting so weird today?
        Френсис Чэн: It just feels out of place... ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
        Френсис Чэн: You're not normally like this when you're sober.
        Френсис Чэн: Okay, whatever. Pretend I didn't ask. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#GoTo(@要一起洗澡話題結束)>>
-> Sorry, it just came up.
<<#EndSimple>>
Френсис Чэн: You're being really weird today.
Френсис Чэн: Like you're a completely different person... ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
<< @要一起洗澡話題結束 >>
<< #IsElseTo ($FoundStomachMedicine = 0, @回答完胃藥問題) >>
Френсис Чэн: Oh! I forgot to buy my stomach meds!
Френсис Чэн: Dammit, why do I keep forgetting...
<<#Simple(3)>>
-> I bought some. They're in the cabinet.($FoundStomachMedicine)
    Френсис Чэн: What?! ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭) >>
    Френсис Чэн: That's great! I actually forgot to restock.
    Френсис Чэн: You're always so attentive!
    Френсис Чэн: Thank you!
    <<#GoTo(@繼續深聊胃藥問題)>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#GoTo(@回答完胃藥問題)>>
<<@繼續深聊胃藥問題>>
Френсис Чэн: What brand did you get?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> "Pepto-Bismol"
    Внутренний голос: Hm? I'm talking nonsense.
    Френсис Чэн: ...
    Френсис Чэн: Is that a thing?
    Френсис Чэн: Did you mean Epto-Fismol? Hahaha!
    Френсис Чэн: Pepto-Bismol sounds like something from a parallel universe.
    Френсис Чэн: Pepto-Bismol... Hahaha! ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
    Френсис Чэн: Hm... Epto-Fismol? ; << #GoTo (@買對牌子囉) >>
-> Epto-Fismol.
    Френсис Чэн: Oh, that!
    << @買對牌子囉 >>
    Френсис Чэн: Great! That was the right one! ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭) >>
    Френсис Чэн: The other brands sometimes make it worse...
    Френсис Чэн: I don't think I ever specifically told you what to buy... Have you been taking notes?
    Френсис Чэн: That's so sweet. You're making me feel kind of inconsiderate in comparison...
    Внутренний голос: She's fine the way she is right now.
    <<#Simple(3)>>
    -> I like how you are now, Fran.
        Френсис Чэн: Oh! A confession!
        Френсис Чэн: You can really do those without batting an eye.
        Френсис Чэн: But I like how you are now, too! ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
        <<#GoTo(@回答完胃藥問題)>>
    -> ...
    << #EndSimple >>
    Френсис Чэн: I'm working on it! ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
-> Haveto-Usemore
    Внутренний голос: Oh my god...
    Френсис Чэн: ...
    Френсис Чэн: Sorry... I know I always complain about your lack of humor...
    Френсис Чэн: But you didn't have to force that one. ; << Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_吹頭_抬頭倒播) >>
    Френсис Чэн: That was kinda bad.
    Внутренний голос: Ahh! I want to dig a hole and hide in it forever.
    Френсис Чэн: You meant Epto-Fismol, right? ; << #GoTo (@買對牌子囉) >>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<@回答完胃藥問題>>

body:

title: 先調查到硬碟，鄰居跑來
body:
<< Set ($PlayerMove, false) >>
Сьюзан Цю: Excuse me, but could you keep the noise down?
Джордж Е: Hey, take it easy, honey! ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站插腰) >>
<<#Simple(4)>>
-> ...And you are?
    Сьюзан Цю: Wow, what happened?
    Сьюзан Цю: You're just going to pretend you don't know us?
    Джордж Е: Calm down!
    Джордж Е: So sorry, Mr. Dai. We're from downstairs.
    Джордж Е: We came over to say hi when we moved in last month.
-> Good evening.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Сьюзан Цю: Let's just cut to the chase.
Сьюзан Цю: I'm going insane over the racket you're making!
Внутренний голос: We weren't being that loud...
Сьюзан Цю: Could you not move furniture around at night?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> We're not moving anything ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站插腰抬手) >>
    Сьюзан Цю: Huh?
    Сьюзан Цю: How's that possible? ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站插腰抬手倒播) >>
    Сьюзан Цю: I kept hearing noises from your house.
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>I told you, it's probably not coming from Mr. Dai. </color>
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>It's coming from Mr. Liu on the other side!</color>
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>He said he was moving soon, remember?</color>
    <<@我們沒有在搬家具。+一般2>>
    Сьюзан Цю: Huh? Really?
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>Yes!</color>
    Сьюзан Цю: Well why didn't you say?
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>I've been saying that this whole time...</color>
    Сьюзан Цю: Oh... well then...
    Сьюзан Цю: Wow... I'm so sorry... ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站插腰倒播) >>
    Сьюзан Цю: Looks like it's my bad. Hahaha!
    Сьюзан Цю: It's fine! We're okay now. Sorry to bother you!
    Сьюзан Цю: Goodbye!
    Джордж Е: ...
    Джордж Е: So sorry about that, Mr. Dai. My wife can be a bit... tactless.
    <<#Simple(4)>>
    -> Please tell her to not do that again. ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站抬手) >>
        Джордж Е: Will do. Will do. I apologize.
        Джордж Е: Until next time. Good night. ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站抬手倒播) >>
    -> It's okay. ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站點頭) >>
        Джордж Е: Thank you. I apologize.
        Джордж Е: Until next time. Good night.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    << Set ($PlayerMove, true) >> ;<<#End>>
-> We'll move whenever we feel like it.
    Сьюзан Цю: ...Whenever you feel like it?!
    Сьюзан Цю: ...But you can't be so loud at night!
    Сьюзан Цю: Everyone's sleeping!
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>I keep telling you, it's not them! </color>
    Сьюзан Цю: What? He admitted it though. ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站插腰低頭) >>
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>He's probably being sarcastic because you were off to a blunt start...</color>
    Сьюзан Цю: I'm direct! It's how I talk!
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>I know, but they're not the ones making all that noise. </color>
    Джордж Е: <color=#8f9ba1>It's Mr. Liu over there. You got the wrong door. </color> ; << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服1_側站插腰低頭倒播) >>
    <<#GoTo(@我們沒有在搬家具。+一般2)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
